nodes.label: localStorage-First Onboarding with Single HTTP Commit
nodes.rationale: Verification plan confirming steps 1-3 write only to localStorage (no fetch, no DB reads) and step 4 makes exactly one POST /api/onboarding/complete persisting all three fields. Zero code changes required — all four invariants already hold. Noted out-of-scope: root page always redirects to step-1 (OB-1) and localStorage drafts persist indefinitely (OB-2).

nodes.label: Onboarding Draft (readDraft/writeDraft/clearDraft)
nodes.rationale: Client draft in localStorage under KEY='onboardingDraft' via src/lib/onboarding/clientState.ts; each step pre-fills from and writes to the draft, never the server, until commit.

nodes.label: POST /api/onboarding/complete Atomic Commit
nodes.rationale: Single prisma.user.update writes nativeLanguage, englishLevel, goals, interfaceLanguage and flips onboardingCompleted=true in one DB call, then re-issues the JWT with the updated claim so middleware sees the flag on the next request.

nodes.label: i18n Short-Circuit to English on /onboarding/*
nodes.rationale: src/i18n/request.ts returns {locale:'en', messages:en.json} for any /onboarding/* path without touching Prisma — guarantees no hidden DB read of nativeLanguage for localizing onboarding steps.

hyperedges.label: Manual Onboarding Four-Step Flow (localStorage draft to single commit)
